key_drivers: Iran-US conflict (Operation Epic Fury) driving oil prices above $100/bbl, VIX elevated at 27.44, risk-off environment dominating all asset classes
Rising real yields (DFII10 at 2.02%, +14bps over week) and surging MOVE index (108.84, +28% in 3 weeks) pressuring equities and precious metals
USD safe-haven demand (DXY ~99.90, approaching 100) weighing on commodities and FX; EIA crude build of +6.9M barrels fifth consecutive week but Hormuz threat overrides inventory bearishness for CL

stale_sources: DFII10 (Mar 25 data, 1 business day lag - acceptable)
fallbacks_used: Gold ETF flows: Bloomberg/CoinDesk (primary WGC not accessed)
MOVE: Bitget/DDS Finance news (TradingView not scraped directly)
